QuerySubnetList.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
QuerySubnetList.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, typically no more than 1000, default is 1000
QuerySubnetList.vpcId: The ID of the VPC to which the subnet belongs
QuerySubnetList.zoneName: The name of the availability zone to which the subnet belongs
QuerySubnetList.subnetIds: Specifies the subnets to query; multiple subnet IDs are separated by commas
